title: Subarray Sum Equals K
coreIdea: Count the number of contiguous subarrays summing to k by tracking running prefix sums and using a hashmap of prefix-sum frequencies, since a subarray sums to k exactly when two prefix sums differ by k.
recognitionCues: asks for count of subarrays with a given sum
array may contain negative numbers, ruling out a simple sliding window
approach: Maintain a running prefix_sum and a hashmap of {prefix_sum: frequency}, initialized with {0: 1}. For each element, add it to prefix_sum, then check if (prefix_sum - k) exists in the hashmap; if so, add its frequency to the answer count. Then increment the current prefix_sum's frequency in the hashmap.
